allow: Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./liga-basquet.postman_collection.json'\); console.log\('Schema:', c.info.schema\); console.log\('First folder:', c.item[0].name\); console.log\('First request body sample:', JSON.stringify\(c.item[3].item[0].request.body\)\);")
Bash(npx --yes newman@6 run liga-basquet.postman_collection.json -e liga-basquet.postman_environment.json --reporters cli --bail)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const t=j.token; require\('child_process'\).execSync\('curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/auth/me -H \\"Authorization: Bearer '+t+'\\"',{stdio:'inherit'}\);")
Bash(npx --yes newman@6 run liga-basquet.postman_collection.json -e liga-basquet.postman_environment.json --reporters cli)
